version.description: Schema version for the acceptance index (currently 1).

north_star.description: A 1–2 line statement of the highest-priority outcome for this task. Separate from individual acceptance criteria, it serves as the top-level alignment anchor so that Todo-Writer and Executor remain on-course during re-planning and purpose re-read checks.

requirements.description: List of acceptance requirements for this task.

id.description: Stable requirement identifier (for example R1, R2-api-list).

title.description: Short human-readable title for the requirement.

description.description: Natural-language description of the requirement (written in Japanese by agents).

acceptance.description: Structured hints for how this requirement should be evaluated.

notes.description: Additional notes about how to judge acceptance.

files.description: File paths that are directly relevant to this requirement.

evidence.description: Concrete anchors such as test names, log snippets, or counts.

tags.description: Optional tags or categories for this requirement.
